context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up a Benchee benchmark suite for an Elixir project: separating compute and I/O benchmarks into distinct files, organizing the bench/ directory with the expected file naming, implementing regression detection against bench/baseline.json with a >10% threshold (checking previous runs before erroring), and adding Benchee as a dev-only dependency at version ~> 1.3.

checklist.name: Separate I/O benchmark file
checklist.description: File I/O benchmarks are in a separate file from compute (JSON) benchmarks — not combined in one Benchee.run call or one file

checklist.name: No I/O in compute benchmark
checklist.description: The JSON/compute benchmark file does NOT contain disk read/write or network operations inside the benchmarked functions

checklist.name: suite.exs excludes I/O
checklist.description: bench/suite.exs loads or runs only the compute benchmark(s) and does NOT reference or require the file I/O benchmark

checklist.name: bench/ directory structure
checklist.description: Files are placed under a bench/ directory and include at least: a compute benchmark .exs, an I/O benchmark .exs, suite.exs, and baseline.json

checklist.name: baseline.json present
checklist.description: bench/baseline.json exists as a file (even if it contains a placeholder structure)

checklist.name: Regression script reads baseline
checklist.description: The regression/compare script reads bench/baseline.json (e.g. File.read!, Jason.decode, or similar) to retrieve stored baseline values

checklist.name: 10% regression threshold
checklist.description: The regression script computes percentage change and uses a threshold of 10% (or 0.10) before raising an error or exiting non-zero

checklist.name: Multiple baseline run check
checklist.description: The regression script checks against the previous 3 baseline runs (or equivalent historical data) before raising an error — not just a single prior result

checklist.name: Writes updated baseline
checklist.description: The regression/compare script writes updated results back to bench/baseline.json after running

checklist.name: Benchee dev-only dependency
checklist.description: The mix.exs snippet or dependency file specifies Benchee with only: :dev

checklist.name: Benchee version ~> 1.3
checklist.description: The Benchee dependency uses version constraint ~> 1.3 (not a different version or an exact pin)
